zh.lifeSummary: 當Duchess Alana de Berry於1372年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾時，她的父親Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry32歲，母親Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry26歲。她於1395年與Sir Thomas De Walton在英國亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1466年在英國貝德福爾貝德福德享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duchess Alana de Berry于1372年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾时，她的父亲Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry32岁，母亲Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry26岁。她于1395年与Sir Thomas De Walton在英国亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于1466年在英国貝德福爾貝德福德享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Berrey
meanings: English: variant of   Berry  .

variants.name: Barry
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Bery
meanings: English: variant of   Berry  .
Hungarian (Béry): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Bér, in Baranya, Komárom, Nógrád, Pest, Vas, or Zala counties.

variants.name: Beery
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Béara. See Berry and O'Berry .
Americanized form of Swiss German   Bieri  .

variants.name: Berrie
meanings: Scottish:
(Glasgow): from Middle English or Older Scots (atte) beri ‘(at the) manor house’, see Berry .
variant   Barrie  .

nameMeanings.name: Alana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Alan  , a comparatively recent coinage.

variants.name: Alanna
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alana  , possibly influenced by   Anna .

variants.name: Alanah
meanings: feminine form of   Alan  , a comparatively recent coinage.

variants.name: Allana
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alana .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Dev .

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Duchess Alana de Berry was born in 1372, in Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, was 32 and her mother, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, was 26. She married Sir Thomas De Walton in 1395, in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died in 1466, in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duchess Alana de Berry est née en 1372, à Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas De Walton en 1395, à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée en 1466, à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duchess Alana de Berry 1372 in Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry 32 und ihre Mutter Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry 26. Sie hat 1395 in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England Sir Thomas De Walton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb 1466 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duchess Alana de Berry è nata il nel 1372 nel Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas De Walton nel 1395, nel Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì nel 1466, nel Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Duchess Alana de Berryが1372年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berryは32歳，母Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berryは26歳であった。1395年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハンティングドンでSir Thomas De Waltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1466年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Duchess Alana de Berry(이)가 1372년 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1395년 영국 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에서 Sir Thomas De Walton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 영국 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duchess Alana de Berry nasceu em 1372, em Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas De Walton em 1395, em Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1466, em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duchess Alana de Berry родилась в 1372 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas De Walton в 1395 г. в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла в 1466 г. в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 94 лет.

Se casó con Sir Thomas De Walton en 1395, en Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió en 1466, en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 94 años.
